Exonumist
Official NYC Tokens Unlisted Tokens Oddities & Errors Patterns & Special Issues Resources

New York City Transportation Tokens, Cataloged and Beyond

Exonumist is a digital reference and showcase focused on New York City transportation tokens, varieties, unlisted pieces, oddities, patterns, club tour issues, and related transit exonumia.

Official listings on this site follow the Atwood-Coffee Catalog where applicable.

Official NYC Tokens Unlisted Tokens
Official Listings
Standard NYC catalog entries arranged by borough and section.
Unlisted Tokens
Real New York City tokens that remain outside the printed listings.
Oddities & Errors
Mispunched, double struck, exception, and other unusual pieces.
Patterns & Special Issues
Patterns, club tour tokens, and other non-circulating material.

Official NYC Tokens

Browse standard A/C-listed New York City tokens by borough and section.

Unlisted Tokens

New York City transportation-related tokens and pieces not presently included in the Atwood-Coffee Catalog.

UNL-MAN-0001 Unlisted Gold Presentation Piece Related to NY630AS

Gold piece related to NY630AS, likely struck as a presentation issue.

View token →
American Vecturist Association

Official collector organization for transportation token research and membership.

Atwood-Coffee Catalog

Reference information about the A/C Catalog used throughout this site.

AVA Membership

The current catalog PDF is available free to AVA members upon request.

Exonumist is an independent collector resource focused on New York City token history.
